name: onecall
description: Your AI assistant reads the room before you ask.

scripts.build: npm run build -w harness && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w web
scripts.demo:adaptive: npm run build:harness && npm run build:server && tsx demo/adaptive-benchmark.ts
scripts.live:trace: npm run build:harness && npm run build:server && tsx live/trace.ts
scripts.live:benchmark: npm run build:harness && npm run build:server && tsx live/benchmark.ts
